description_long: This arcade game cabinet features a bold, angular design with a predominantly black and red color scheme. The front panel displays a vibrant racing car graphic and a dragon-themed marquee at the top, suggesting a high-energy game. The control panel is equipped with two red joysticks and multiple red and black buttons, arranged for two-player gameplay. The side panels are decorated with dynamic red and yellow graphics, including the word 'DRAGONFIRE' and stylized flames, enhancing its visual appeal. The cabinet is constructed from sturdy materials, likely wood or MDF with a glossy laminate finish, and has a large, dark screen area for gameplay. The back panel is plain red, providing a clean and solid appearance from behind.
description: A striking black and red arcade game cabinet with dragon and racing motifs, dual joysticks, and bold side graphics. Features a large screen and a vibrant, themed marquee.
description_view_0: Front view shows the dragon-themed marquee, large screen, racing car graphic, and dual joystick/button control panel.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the 'DRAGONFIRE' text, dynamic red and yellow graphics, and the protruding control panel.
description_view_2: Rear view displays a plain, solid red back panel with no visible graphics or features.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, with matching 'DRAGONFIRE' text and graphic elements, and a clear view of the control panel's side.
attribute_screen_type: unknown (screen area is dark and unlit, with no visible curvature or bezel details)
attribute_control_panel_layout: Two red joysticks and six red/black buttons arranged for two-player side-by-side play, with a racing car graphic on the panel.
attribute_marquee_artwork: Present; features a dramatic dragon head with yellow and black flames on a red background, and bold 'DRAGONFIRE' text.
attribute_side_panel_graphics: Both side panels display dynamic red and black backgrounds with yellow 'DRAGONFIRE' text and stylized racing and flame motifs.
